title: Storm&Lighthouse Two-Pack Letter to Santa Claus Writing Set for Kids 10 Piece Xmas Activity Pack with Red/Blue Sticker Sheets and Pencils Father Christmas Wish List for Boys and Girls
features: 10-piece Christmas Letter to Santa writing set for kids.
Each letter writing pack contains: 4x A4 sheets of writing paper; 2x pre-addressed envelopes; 2x Red or Blue Pencils with Santa Eraser Topper; 2x Red or Blue sheets of 12 stickers.

Make getting ready for Christmas in good time easy with these fun and festive letters to Santa! All the letter structure is already done, just fill in with your child’s name and Christmas wish list, pop the letters in the post, and away they fly!
Not suitable for children aged 3 and under.
description: Help your children get into the festive spirit for the most wonderful time of the year with this handy Letter to Santa writing kit! Each pack contains 2x pre-addressed envelopes with Santa's address, 4x A4 letters to Santa, 2x Red or Blue pencils with a Santa eraser topper, and 2x Red or Blue sheets of 12 assorted Christmas-themed stickers. The letters to Santa have a pink candy- cane border and friendly gingerbread men decorate the corners. Get ready for Christmas by sitting down with your kids to prepare their letter for Santa Claus with these handy pre- written letters: simply help your child to fill in their name, age, and begin writing their Christmas wish list. Once your child has finished writing their Christmas wish list, add a personal touch at the bottom where there is space to add their own drawings. Remember to post your Christmas letter in good time so the elves have plenty of time for toy building! Christmas Letter to Santa writing sets are also great activities for teachers and community group leaders to do with pre-school age children, so why not order in bulk so there are plenty of letters to go around? Two letter writing sets included per single order.
